subject: fix(api): send snake_case field names in API request bodies
body:
The tool-till-tees backend expects snake_case JSON keys. Updated all
API client functions to send snake_case field names over the wire:
- inviteCounterparty: projectIdâ†’project_id, counterpartyEmailâ†’counterparty_email, passphraseLinkâ†’passphrase_link
- splitAgreement: moduleIdsâ†’module_ids, newTitleâ†’new_title
- batchToggleReadyToSign: moduleIdsâ†’module_ids
- resolveProposal: responseContentâ†’response_content
- createVerification: agreementIdâ†’agreement_id
